description: You are a Sales Operations Analyst cleaning up data in Odoo CRM. Three opportunities were imported without their customer links. Your task is to find these 'orphaned' opportunities and link them to the correct existing customer records: 'Office Design Project - Gemini', 'Q3 Consultation Services' (identify the customer from internal notes or chatter), and 'Software License Renewal - Deco Addict'. Ensure the 'Customer' field is correctly set for each record.
